allow: PowerShell($json = Get-Content "C:\\tmp\\reddit_cs2.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; $json.data.children[0].data | Select-Object title, url, created_utc)

PowerShell($r = curl.exe -s -o "C:\\tmp\\steamdb.xml" -w "%{http_code}" --max-time 10 -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" "https://steamdb.info/app/730/patchnotes/rss/"; Write-Host "SteamDB: $r")

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== GET /health ==="; curl.exe -s http://localhost:3000/health | ConvertFrom-Json | ConvertTo-Json; Write-Host "`n=== GET /news \(default limit=20\) ==="; $news = curl.exe -s http://localhost:3000/news | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "total: $\($news.total\)"; $news.items | Select-Object -First 5 | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "[$\($_.source\)] $\($_.title\)" }; Write-Host "`n=== GET /news?limit=5&keyword=case ==="; $filtered = curl.exe -s "http://localhost:3000/news?limit=5&keyword=case" | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "total matching 'case': $\($filtered.total\)"; $filtered.items | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "[$\($_.source\)] $\($_.title\)" })
